compiled_state.title: 5888-bb7e: Task A — Write RED structural tests for behavioral drift prevention doc updates
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Story
5888-bb7e — Update project docs to reflect behavioral drift prevention enhancements

## testing_mode
RED

## TDD Test Approach
Create tests/scripts/test-docs-behavioral-drift-prevention.sh with structural assertions for new documentation content. Tests fail RED because the new entries do not exist yet.

## File to Create
tests/scripts/test-docs-behavioral-drift-prevention.sh (executable)

## Test Sections (5 required)

1. **test_claude_md_scope_drift_reviewer_entry** — grep CLAUDE.md agent routing table for 'dso:scope-drift-reviewer' row; assert the agent is registered with model: sonnet and dispatched by: /dso:fix-bug
2. **test_claude_md_intent_search_updated** — grep CLAUDE.md for 'INTENT_CONFLICT' near intent-search entry; assert the enhanced description mentions INTENT_CONFLICT signal
3. **test_config_ref_scope_drift_enabled** — grep plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md for 'scope_drift.enabled'; assert the config key is documented with default value and behavior
4. **test_domain_logic_scope_drift_gate** — grep docs/reference/domain-logic.md for 'scope.drift' or 'scope_drift'; assert the scope-drift gate is documented
5. **test_domain_logic_intent_conflict_signal** — grep docs/reference/domain-logic.md for 'INTENT_CONFLICT'; assert the signal type is documented in the gate reference table

## .test-index Entry
CLAUDE.md: tests/scripts/test-docs-behavioral-drift-prevention.sh [test_claude_md_scope_drift_reviewer_entry]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-docs-behavioral-drift-prevention.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-docs-behavioral-drift-prevention.sh
- [ ] Test file contains all 5 test sections
  Verify: grep -c 'test_claude_md_scope_drift_reviewer_entry\|test_claude_md_intent_search_updated\|test_config_ref_scope_drift_enabled\|test_domain_logic_scope_drift_gate\|test_domain_logic_intent_conflict_signal' tests/scripts/test-docs-behavioral-drift-prevention.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] Running tests produces failures (RED)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-docs-behavioral-drift-prevention.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]
- [ ] .test-index entry added with RED marker
  Verify: grep 'CLAUDE.md.*test-docs-behavioral-drift-prevention.sh.*\[test_claude_md_scope_drift_reviewer_entry\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
